questions.question: What is there now for those who are in Christ Jesus?
Paul says that all things work together for good for whom?
options: Those who love God and are called according to his purpose
questions.answer: Those who love God and are called according to his purpose

questions.question: Paul says that nothing can separate believers from the love of God in Christ Jesus.
If God is for us, who can be _____ us?
The Spirit himself testifies with our spirit that we are _____ of God.
